Name: UMaterialFunction
Description: A Material Function is a collection of material expressions that can be reused in different materials

Variables.Name: StateId
Variables.Description: Used by materials using this function to know when to recompile.

Variables.Name: Description
Variables.Description: Description of the function which will be displayed as a tooltip wherever the function is used.

Variables.Name: bExposeToLibrary
Variables.Description: Whether to list this function in the material function library, which is a window in the material editor that lists categorized functions.

Variables.Name: bUseFullPrecision
Variables.Description: Whether forces the function to use full (highp) precision in the pixel shader.

Variables.Name: FunctionExpressions
Variables.Description: Array of material expressions, excluding Comments.  Used by the material editor.

Variables.Name: bReentrantFlag
Variables.Description: Transient flag used to track re-entrance in recursive functions like IsDependent.

Variables.Name: ParentFunction
Variables.Description: Used in the material editor, points to the function asset being edited, which this function is just a preview for.

Variables.Name: LibraryCategories_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description:
Categories that this function belongs to in the material function library.  
	  Ideally categories should be chosen carefully so that there are not too many.

Variables.Name: LibraryCategoriesText
Variables.Description:
Categories that this function belongs to in the material function library.  
	  Ideally categories should be chosen carefully so that there are not too many.

Variables.Name: FunctionEditorComments
Variables.Description: Array of comments associated with this material; viewed in the material editor.
